The [[Delvin Constructs/Legends|Delvin Constructs]] Model '''Fac H-65''' was the heavy vehicle factory used by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Designed specifically to produce tracked vehicles, several of these facilities were purchased from Delvin Constructs by Rebel Alliance, who made arrangements with the manufacturers of the [[T4-B heavy tank]] and [[Mobile Proton Torpedo Launcher-2a|MPTL-2a artillery]] to produce their vehicles at multiple locations.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
